subject: Pidove, a small grey and white pigeon-like Pokemon in a group on a rooftop or urban ledge
description: Two or three small, round grey-and-white pigeon-like Pokemon are clustered together on what appears to be a ledge or rooftop with an urban or town backdrop visible below. The creatures have compact bodies, small beaks, and a calm settled posture typical of city pigeons. The background shows a warm-toned town or city landscape in soft detail. The scene has a relaxed, urban-everyday quality — pigeons being pigeons, in a Pokemon world.
foreground: small grey-white pigeon Pokemon clustered on a ledge
background: warm urban or town landscape viewed from above
